meaning: n.女巫大聚会,十三女巫大集会
examples: His coven, I thought, of course.
I think that it's a vampire coven.
Beautiful Creatures is about a coven of witches living in the deep South and co-stars Jeremy Irons and Emma Thompson.
One of her victims may have been the famous witch Isobel Gowdie, the woman whose confessions give us the notion of a 'coven'.
